decision-tree.root-question: At the current step, does the golden eval pass AND online-quality composite_score >= floor AND latency p95 <= +20% baseline?

branch.when: gate.golden_pass == true AND quality.composite_score >= floor AND latency.p95_delta_pct <= 20
branch.question: Has the hold window elapsed (24h for 1%/5%, 48h for 25%, 168h for 100%)?

branch.when: gate.golden_pass == false OR quality.composite_score < floor OR latency.p95_delta_pct > 20

example.trace: 5% step, golden eval pass, composite 0.83 (floor 0.80), p95 +12% → run-the-checklist (continue hold)
